creator: wxs@atarininja.org
text:
On Wed, Aug 30, 2006 at 11:10:32PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/ntop,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/102705 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/102705

I approve.

-- WXS
